hero.description: Create a Cert to showcase your commitment to sustainability and inspire real change.

explainer.title: What is a Cert?
explainer.body1: A Cert is your impact story—proof of your contribution to people, communities, and the planet.
explainer.body2: It helps you document, share, and celebrate your positive impact with transparency and credibility.

recent.errorFallback: Please try again in a moment.
recent.emptyLine1: You haven't created any Certs yet.
recent.emptyLine2: Create your first Cert to get started.

drafts.signedOutDescription: Draft Certs are saved to your account so you can continue your work later.
drafts.loadingDescription: We are checking for saved Cert applications.
drafts.errorFallback: Failed to load drafts. Please try again.
drafts.emptyDescription: Start a new Cert and save it as a draft when you want to return later.

validation.contributorNameRequired: All contributors must have a name
validation.coverImageMaxSize: Cover image must be 4MB or smaller
validation.coverImageType: Cover image must be JPG, PNG, or WebP

sidebar.completeFirstStep: Please complete the first step to generate the preview.

bullets: Use a short and descriptive name for your cert.
Include a website or social link to your cert for easy access.

tips.pre: When writing your impact story, use this STAR framework:
bullets: Situation — What was happening and who or what was affected?
Task — What was the role of your organization, group, or community? Who else was involved?
Action — Describe what your organization or community did.
Result — What happened as a result? Include numbers if available, and mention both tangible and non-tangible outcomes. This will be supported by the impact data you provide later.
tips.post: Write freely. Longer stories are welcome.

bullets: Add your own community or organization first, then other people or groups who joined.
Make sure everyone agrees to be included.
Upload your site boundary in GeoJSON format so it shows on the map.
Make sure you have completed all the previous steps.
Review the look of your cert before submitting.
You have completed all the steps! No more tips for this section.

cover.heading: Share your impact at a glance.

coverImage.label: Cover Image
coverImage.info: Choose an image that best represents your work
coverImage.placeholder: Upload or drag and drop an image

title.label: Cert Title
title.info: Give your cert a clear, descriptive title

dateRange.label: Cert Date Range
dateRange.info: Select the period when your work and impact took place

workType.label: What kind of work are you doing?
workType.info: Feel free to choose more than one

story.label: Your Impact Story
story.description: Tell us about your impact — what changed, who was involved, and how it's helping. Take your time. Your story helps inspire others and verify your work.
story.info: Tell us what you did and what happened as a result

shortDescription.label: Short Description
shortDescription.description: A short description of your impact story. This will be used as the short description of the cert.
shortDescription.info: Summarize your work and its results in a few lines
shortDescription.placeholder: A quick summary about this cert.

contributors.label: List of Contributors
contributors.description: Add everyone involved in this cert — including your own community or organization and any collaborators. Tip: Start by adding your own group first before listing your partners or supporters.
contributors.info: List any individuals or organizations that contributed to this work.

boundaries.label: Site Boundaries
boundaries.description: Please upload your site boundary in GeoJSON format so we can visualize your cert on the map.
boundaries.info: Add the boundaries that best represent where the work took place.
boundaries.selectHelp: Select the boundaries for this cert, or add new ones.

permissions.label: Permissions
permissions.confirm: I confirm that all listed contributors gave their permission to include their work in this Cert.
permissions.terms: I agree to the Terms & Conditions.

submit.signedInRequired: You must be signed in to publish.

submit.notSignedIn: You are not signed in. Please sign in to continue.
submit.readyDescription: Please click the button below to publish your cert.
